item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 2s Whether Constitution Hill is declared for his first attempt in Group company on the Flat is
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 2s Whether Constitution Hill is declared for his first attempt in Group company on the Flat is a question that is unlikely to be resolved until Thursday morning, but Newbury clerk of the course George Hill says he is happy with the condition of the track
https:// racingpost.com/news/britain/c onstitution-hill-latest-newbury-aiming-to-start-with-good-ground-on-friday-but-track-expected-to-dry-back-by-saturday-a4NQH7w65rNv/?_sgm_campaign=fcs_acd39d071c000&_sgm_source=N244876%7Cproduct&_sgm_action=search&_sgm_term=newbury&_sgm_pinned=false …

item.title: AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 4min "I’m sure he’ll come on for the run, but hopefully he can get his season off to a positi
item.description: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 4min "I’m sure he’ll come on for the run, but hopefully he can get his season off to a positive start and run a nice race" De attheraces.com 1 1 280
